{{nihongo|'''Takeo Shimokorihiko Shrine Shimogu'''|建男霜凝日子神社下宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takeo Shimokorihiko Shrine Shimogu'''|建男霜凝日子神社下宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takeo Shimokorihiko Shrine Shimogu'''|建男霜凝日子神社下宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takeo Shimokorihiko Shrine Shimogu'''|建男霜凝日子神社下宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bungo Province]].
